publicationStmt.publisher: Mohammadia School of Engineers (EMI), ALELM Research Group, Computer Science Department

sourceDesc.p: The QAMAR Corpus: Original Quranic text in Uthmani script, along with corresponding morphological feature values, including the MSA form, the Stem, the lemma, the root and the pos classification.

text.body:
سورة الفاتحة
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
اسْم اسْم سمو اسم اسم
...
...
...
